service_list.name: Roof Repairs
service_list.description: Fixing broken tiles, rusty metal sheets, and other structural damage to restore integrity.

service_list.name: Roof Painting and Sealing
service_list.description: Applying high-quality coatings to seal leaks and improve thermal efficiency.

service_list.name: Roof Replacement & Reroofing
service_list.description: Installing brand new roofs for properties with severe damage or outdated materials.

service_list.name: Roof Repointing
service_list.description: Sealing gaps between tiles to prevent water ingress and improve insulation.

service_list.name: Gutter Repair & Replacement
service_list.description: Repairing or installing new gutters to ensure proper water drainage away from the home.

service_list.name: Roof Ventilation Systems
service_list.description: Installing whirlybirds and ventilation systems to reduce heat and moisture buildup.

service_list.name: Roof Inspection & Reports
service_list.description: Providing thorough assessments of roof condition and recommending cost-effective solutions.

brand_assets.font_family: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Open Sans', 'Helvetica Neue', sans-serif
key_messaging: Brisbane's best quality roof restoration services
Restore roofs of all types to their former glory
One-stop shop for all your roof restoration needs
Much cheaper price than a brand-new roof

improved_hero_copy.subhead: We restore metal, tiled, and Colorbond roofs to their former glory—saving you thousands compared to a full replacement.

improved_hero_copy.h1: Expert Roof Repairs & Restoration in Brisbane
improved_hero_copy.subhead: From minor leaks to full re-roofing, our 10+ years of experience ensures a durable, energy-efficient result.

improved_service_descriptions.Roof Repairs: We identify and fix leaks, broken tiles, and rusted metal to stop water damage immediately.
improved_service_descriptions.Roof Painting and Sealing: Our advanced coating technology seals your roof against the elements while reflecting heat to lower energy bills.
improved_service_descriptions.Roof Replacement & Reroofing: When restoration isn't enough, we install high-quality new roofs that last for decades.
improved_service_descriptions.Roof Repointing: We fill gaps between tiles to stop drafts and moisture, improving your home's insulation.
improved_service_descriptions.Gutter Repair & Replacement: Protect your foundation with seamless gutters that channel water away from your property.
improved_service_descriptions.Roof Ventilation Systems: Reduce heat and humidity with our efficient whirlybird installations, extending the life of your roof.

meta_descriptions.home: Brisbane Roof Restoration Experts provides top-quality roof restoration, repairs, and replacements across Brisbane and South-East Queensland. Save money with our affordable, durable solutions.
meta_descriptions.about: Learn about Brisbane Roof Restoration Experts, a local family-owned business with over 10 years of experience in restoring all types of roofs.
meta_descriptions.contact: Contact Brisbane Roof Restoration Experts today for a free quote on roof repairs, painting, or replacement. Serving Brisbane and surrounding suburbs.

brief.redesign_brief: The current site is functional but generic, relying heavily on repetitive suburb pages and basic text. We should keep the clear service list and 'one-stop-shop' value proposition but improve the visual hierarchy, hero copy, and mobile responsiveness. The redesign matters because the current site lacks emotional connection and fails to immediately communicate the cost-saving benefits of restoration versus replacement, which is a key selling point.

ready_to_build_concerns: No ABN or license numbers visible
No team member photos or bios
Logo is a cropped PNG, not SVG
Email address not listed on site
